message_en: DB3D-Floora 1.0.2 is available. This update adds a manual update-check button, fixes Brick to true 1/2 stagger, improves I-Block generation coverage, and makes manual update checking more reliable.
message_zh_tw: DB3D-Floora 1.0.2 已可下載。本次更新新增手動檢查更新按鈕，修正磚縫為標準 1/2 交丁，改善工字型生成完整度，並提升手動檢查更新的穩定性。

hub_notice.message_en: Bluform Hub integration is coming soon. Future updates will be managed from the Hub.
hub_notice.message_zh_tw: Bluform Hub 整合即將推出，之後更新會改由 Hub 管理。
